sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 325 of 2024 ITRA 326 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.3344/2024. 2. For orders on CMA No.2449/2024. 3. For orders on office objection No.1. 4. For orders on CMA No.2450/2024. 5. For orders on CMA No.2451/2024. 6. For hearing of main case. 24.12.2025 This is time barred reference application pending since 2024. On each successive date adjournment has been sought on behalf of the applicant’s counsel and today applicant remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
